tasks.title: Audit current Hero & ThreeBackground — baseline metrics
tasks.description: Measure current LCP, CLS, INP on Hero. Screenshot current state. Record particle count, shader complexity, bundle size impact of ThreeBackground.
tasks.acceptance: Baseline metrics recorded. Screenshots saved. Known issues documented.

tasks.title: Upgrade ThreeBackground — GPGPU particles with custom shaders
tasks.description: Replace current particle system with GPGPU-based approach: vertex shader for position/velocity, fragment shader for glow. Add cursor repulsion (not attraction) for premium feel. Target: 3000 particles at 60fps on mid-range mobile.
tasks.code:
Key changes:
- Use ShaderMaterial with custom vertex/fragment GLSL
- Add uTime, uPointer uniforms
- Particle repulsion from cursor: pos += normalize(pos - cursor) * force
- Additive blending for glow effect
- dpr={[1, 2]} on Canvas
- Fallback: CSS dot-grid + gradient for reduced-motion
tasks.acceptance: Particles repel from cursor. 60fps on iPhone 12 equivalent. Graceful fallback.

tasks.title: Add mesh gradient + aurora glow layers behind particles
tasks.description: Layer 1: Deep dark base (oklch(8% 0.005 160)). Layer 2: Mesh gradient with 3 radial gradients (violet, blue, amber). Layer 3: Aurora animation via CSS @keyframes. Layer 4: Particles on top. All layers use pointer-events-none.
tasks.acceptance: Aurora animates smoothly. No layout shift. Works without JS.

tasks.title: Refactor Hero content layout — asymmetric split for desktop
tasks.description: Desktop: Left-aligned text (60% width) + right-side floating product cards (40%). Mobile: Centered stack. Remove center bias per design-taste-frontend rules. Keep trust bar inline.
tasks.code:
Desktop layout:
{/* Text content}
{/* FloatingCards}
Mobile: stack vertically, center text
tasks.acceptance: Desktop: asymmetric split. Mobile: centered stack. No horizontal scroll.

tasks.title: Upgrade typography — premium font stack + compact sizes for Cyrillic
tasks.description: Replace Inter with Geist for display. Keep Onest for body. Apply CIS rules: line-height >= 1.1, letter-spacing: normal, clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem) for H1. Add gradient text accent on key word only (not full headline).
tasks.acceptance: Cyrillic reads perfectly. No tight spacing. Gradient on single word only.

tasks.title: Add scroll-driven parallax + content fade on scroll
tasks.description: Background particles parallax (y: 0% → 30%). Content fades out (opacity: 1 → 0) as user scrolls. Use useScroll + useTransform. Respect reduced-motion: disable parallax, keep content visible.
tasks.acceptance: Smooth parallax on scroll. Content fades. No jank. Reduced-motion: static.

tasks.title: Add premium micro-interactions — magnetic CTA + text reveal
tasks.description: Verify MagneticButton works with spring physics (useMotionValue, NOT useState). Add TextRevealWords with blur+opacity entrance. Add scroll indicator animation at bottom. All animations use spring physics.
tasks.acceptance: Magnetic effect smooth. Text reveals word-by-word. No layout shift.

tasks.title: Performance optimization — lazy load, code split, 60fps guard
tasks.description: Dynamic import ThreeBackground with ssr:false. Add performance budget: max 3000 particles on mobile, 5000 on desktop. Add will-change: transform on animated elements. Test on throttled CPU.
tasks.acceptance: 60fps on mid-range mobile. No SSR for Three.js. LCP < 2.5s.

tasks.title: Accessibility audit — reduced motion, contrast, focus states
tasks.description: Verify usePrefersReducedMotion disables all motion. Check contrast ratios (WCAG AA). Add focus-visible states to CTA buttons. Test keyboard navigation. Add aria-labels to decorative elements.
tasks.acceptance: Passes axe-core. Reduced motion works. Keyboard navigable.

tasks.title: Vercel deploy + visual regression check
tasks.description: Push to main. Verify Vercel auto-deploy. Screenshot production. Compare with baseline. Check Core Web Vitals in Vercel Analytics. Report metrics.
tasks.acceptance: Deployed to production. LCP improved or maintained. No CLS regression. Visual matches design intent.
